steps.title: Convert projects app to TypeScript
steps.description: Fully type ProjectEditor, SubprojectEditor, and related components, fix UI bugs.

steps.title: Audit remaining apps for JavaScript files
steps.description: Identify .js files across contacts, framework, projects, tasks, etc. and plan conversion.

steps.title: Convert first additional app (e.g., contacts) to TypeScript
steps.description: Migrate components, update tests, ensure typechecks pass.

steps.title: Establish shared types and utils
steps.description: Expand @myorg/types and utils as needed for new conversions.

steps.title: Convert remaining apps to TypeScript
steps.description: Migrate tasks, framework, and any future apps; ensure typechecks and builds succeed.

steps.title: Verify tasks app
steps.description: Confirm tasks app is full TS and typechecks clean.

steps.title: Refine CSS architecture
steps.description: Implement phase3-css-architecture plan across workspaces, isolate global rules and clean styles.

steps.title: Replace inline styles in TasksPage
steps.description: Move styles from TasksPage.tsx into TasksPage.module.css and remove inline attributes.

steps.title: Analyze projects.css and ensure module files exist
steps.description: Inspect legacy projects.css and verify component-specific module files are created.

steps.title: Begin using CSS modules in Projects components
steps.description: ProjectsPage now uses layout.module.css; additional components still need updates.

steps.title: Convert ProjectTile root to CSS module
steps.description: Import ProjectTile.module.css and apply on root element.

steps.title: Phase 3 CSS architecture complete
steps.description: All core components either reference CSS modules or have dedicated module files; legacy global styles can be pruned.

steps.title: Build comprehensive testing infrastructure
steps.description: Execute phase4-testing-infrastructure: add unit, integration, and E2E tests.

steps.title: Configure Jest for CSS modules
steps.description: Added moduleNameMapper entries and style mock; installed identity-obj-proxy.

steps.title: Verify existing unit tests
steps.description: Ran two test suites with 10 tests and they all pass.

steps.title: Add ProjectTile unit test
steps.description: Created a simple render/interact test for ProjectTile component.
